action_summary: s2 complete: PreToolUse hook + classifier + action_classification.yaml. 27 new tests (20 unit + 7 subprocess). action_summary: Honored pivot signal: ran pal_codereview (gpt-5.2) + rhea_challenge (Dreamer/Doubter/Decider adversarial). Patched 4 HIGH code issues: fail-open→fail-closed default (require STEPPROOF_FAIL_OPEN=1 opt-in); bash-pattern evasions sudo/path/env/command/backslash; rm-rf variants --/separated-flags/home; silent classification-load failure. Also wrote docs/BOOTSTRAP_CONSTRAINT.md formalizing Rhea's ruling: dev runs advisory-only, enforcement validates on post-ship fresh run. 14 new tests (11 classifier evasion + 3 hook fail-closed/classification-missing).
measurement: 77/77 tests. 4 HIGH code-review issues patched. 14 evasion regressions caught that would have shipped. Bootstrap paradox explicitly ruled on — no more dogfood-while-building.
heading: on course

action_summary: s3 complete: 5 lifecycle hooks shipped (SessionStart/End/PreCompact/UserPromptSubmit/PermissionRequest). Each is a self-contained uv script exiting 0 on all errors. Also added POST /runs/:id/abandon to the runtime. 16 new tests covering happy path + silent-when-no-run + malformed-stdin + audit-buffer-cap + secret redaction. One real bug caught: UserPromptSubmit was using `^`-anchored regex against mid-sentence mentions; unanchor at match-time.
measurement: 93/93 tests. 3/6 steps verified. All 5 lifecycle hooks covered. Bootstrap constraint honored — no hook installed in this session.
